title: Korean-Style Stir-Fry with Quinoa
description: A hearty German-inspired dish that combines the flavors of Korea with the comfort of quinoa.
instructions: Heat 1 teaspoon of sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the cooked quinoa, Korean stir-fry sauce, citrusy honey, and soy sauce to the skillet.
Stir-fry everything together until the quinoa is well coated with the sauce.
Add the chewy brown rice noodles to the skillet and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the quinoa and noodle mixture to a serving dish.
Garnish with green onions and serve hot.
